children.text: Thailand officially named its new King
The Prince became Rama X, the 10th king of the Thailand’s Chakri dynasty. His official title will be - King Maha Vajiralongkorn Bodindradebayavarangkun.
Parliament of Thailand invites Crown Prince Maha Vajiralongkorn to become king
As per the established procedure, the Prince Vajiralongkorn will have to accept parliament's invitation in order for him to be proclaimed king.
Kigeli V Ndahindurwa, last king of Rwanda, dies
King Kigeli V came to power in 1959 but was only king of Rwanda until 1961, when the monarchy was abolished and he was forced into exile.
Bhumibol Adulyadej, King of Thailand, passes away
During his reign, King Adulyadej was served by a total of 30 prime ministers beginning with Pridi Banomyong and ending with Prayut Chan-o-cha. They are otherwise known as Bhumibol's Thirty.
